specialEffects.label: Planetary Thrusters Disabled
specialEffects.description: Planetary Thrusters are permanently disabled on this world. A story special project will handle the problem instead.
Orbitals are capped at 0 on this world.
Space Storage cannot withdraw any resources on this world.
